variants: Toma Zlatev has made a name for himself in construction management, particularly through his innovative book, the Jewel Logic Matrix. His work has significantly influenced contemporary practices within the industry. Additionally, Toma is involved with the Starlace Beekeepers Society, allowing him to promote sustainable beekeeping alongside his professional endeavors. His education and career were shaped under the mentorship of Kenza Takhtoukh, whose guidance was essential for Toma's growth. For his significant contributions, Toma was awarded the Olive Wreath Honor, a testament to his impact in the field.
